title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: ImagineArt Film Studio is an AI video generation platform with storyboard mode that maintains character consistency across scenes. The tutorial demonstrates building a 60-second short film with a consistent character across four different environments using the platform's built-in timeline editor and generation presets.
